## Submission Type
- [ ] New Paper
- [ ] New Ebook
- [ ] Content Update

## Author Checklist
- [ ] My content is entirely within my designated folder `content/authors/[my-username]/`.
- [ ] I have not modified any system files (`scripts/`, `content/_templates/`, etc.).
- [ ] All my images are under 500KB.
- [ ] My Markdown Frontmatter (`category`, `domain`) matches the allowed taxonomy.

## Copyright & License Agreement ⚠️
- [ ] **I confirm that I am the copyright holder of this content, and I agree to publish it under the CC BY-SA 4.0 License.**
